seo.title: Invoicemonk vs Stripe Invoicing: Pricing, Fees & Features (2026)
seo.description: Compare Invoicemonk and Stripe Invoicing for small business invoicing. Stripe charges 0.4–0.5% per invoice — Invoicemonk is free. See the full feature and pricing comparison.

hero.title: Invoicemonk vs Stripe Invoicing
hero.subtitle: Stripe Invoicing charges 0.4–0.5% per paid invoice on top of payment processing fees. Invoicemonk invoicing is free. Here's the full comparison.

overview: Stripe Invoicing is an add-on to Stripe's payment processing platform. It lets you create and send invoices that your clients pay online via Stripe Checkout. It's functional, but it's designed as a billing tool for developer-led SaaS companies — not as a standalone invoicing solution for freelancers, contractors, or service businesses.

The key difference is cost. Stripe Invoicing charges 0.4% per paid invoice (or 0.5% for invoices not using Stripe Checkout) — on top of the standard 2.9% + $0.30 payment processing fee. For a $5,000 invoice, that's $20–$25 in invoicing fees alone, plus $175 in processing fees. Invoicemonk charges $0 for invoicing on all plans, including the free tier.

Invoicemonk is a purpose-built invoicing platform with expense tracking, receipt scanning, estimates, client management, and multi-currency support. Stripe Invoicing is a feature within a payment platform. If invoicing is your primary need, Invoicemonk delivers more functionality at a fraction of the cost.

pricing.title: Pricing: Stripe Invoicing fees vs Invoicemonk

invoicemonk.title: Invoicemonk
invoicemonk.note: Invoicing is free on every plan. No per-invoice fees. Payment processing fees are charged by your payment gateway — not by Invoicemonk.

competitor.title: Stripe Invoicing
competitor.note: Stripe Invoicing fees are in addition to standard Stripe payment processing fees. A $5,000 invoice costs ~$195 in total fees (invoicing + processing).

pricing.summary: For a business sending 50 invoices/month averaging $2,000 each: Stripe Invoicing fees alone cost $400–$500/month. Invoicemonk invoicing: $0.

invoicemonk.title: Choose Invoicemonk if you…
items: Want free invoicing with no per-invoice fees
Need expense tracking, receipt scanning, and accounting in one tool
Send estimates and convert them to invoices
Need a no-code solution that works immediately
Are a freelancer, contractor, or service business

competitor.title: Choose Stripe Invoicing if you…
items: Already use Stripe for payment processing
Run a SaaS business with subscription billing
Want invoicing integrated directly into your Stripe dashboard

migration.title: Switching from Stripe Invoicing to Invoicemonk

steps.title: Export your client list
steps.desc: Download your Stripe customer data as CSV and import it into Invoicemonk.

steps.title: Set up your business profile
steps.desc: Add your logo, business details, and payment instructions in Invoicemonk.

steps.title: Connect Stripe for payments
steps.desc: Keep using Stripe for payment processing — Invoicemonk integrates with Stripe for online payments while eliminating the per-invoice fee.

items.question: How much does Stripe Invoicing cost?
items.answer: Stripe Invoicing charges 0.4% per paid invoice (or 0.5% for invoices not paid through Stripe Checkout). This is on top of Stripe's standard payment processing fee of 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction. For a $5,000 invoice, total fees are approximately $195.

items.question: Can I use Stripe just for invoicing?
items.answer: Yes, but Stripe Invoicing is designed as an add-on to Stripe's payment processing. You need a Stripe account, and invoicing fees apply per paid invoice. For standalone invoicing without per-invoice fees, Invoicemonk is a better fit.

items.question: What is the best alternative to Stripe Invoicing?
items.answer: Invoicemonk is a strong alternative for businesses that primarily need invoicing. It offers free invoicing on all plans, plus expense tracking, estimates, receipt scanning, and accounting — features Stripe Invoicing doesn't include.

items.question: Can I use Invoicemonk with Stripe?
items.answer: Yes. Invoicemonk integrates with Stripe for payment processing. You get purpose-built invoicing (free) while still accepting online payments through Stripe — without the additional 0.4–0.5% invoicing fee.

items.question: Is Stripe Invoicing free?
items.answer: No. Stripe Invoicing charges 0.4–0.5% per paid invoice in addition to payment processing fees. There is no free tier for Stripe Invoicing.

items.question: Does Stripe Invoicing include expense tracking?
items.answer: No. Stripe Invoicing only handles invoice creation and payment collection. For expense tracking, receipt scanning, and accounting, you need a separate tool like Invoicemonk.

items.question: Which is better for freelancers — Stripe or Invoicemonk?
items.answer: Invoicemonk is built for freelancers with features like estimates, branded templates, expense tracking, and a free tier. Stripe Invoicing is designed for developer-led businesses and SaaS companies.

cta.title: Stop paying per-invoice fees
cta.description: Switch to Invoicemonk — free invoicing with expense tracking, estimates, and accounting. No per-invoice fees, ever.
